rules.rule: FAQPage schema is allowed only when the same FAQ items are visibly rendered from CMS/backend authority.
FAQPage must not contain hidden-only items.
FAQPage and WebPage schema must not include private result/order/share/pay/payment/history URLs.
Schema must not include raw orderNo, payment_id, transaction_id, resultId, attemptId, access_token, or tokenized URL examples.
Unknown source fields must remain Unknown and must not be inferred from Markdown.

current_state.help_faq_schema_source: Markdown-derived visible FAQ only for help-faq slug
current_state.updated_at_available: source_updated_at/updated_at available but policy-specific updated_at mapping not first-class

page_schema_positions.schema: FAQPage blocked until visible approved FAQ, policy_version, updated_at, reviewer, and schema_enabled exist
FAQPage blocked until visible approved FAQ, policy_version, updated_at, reviewer, handling_time, safe identifier fields, and schema_enabled exist
FAQPage blocked until visible approved FAQ, retention/recovery/private URL fields and schema_enabled exist
FAQPage blocked until visible approved FAQ, privacy policy version, analytics/private URL/deletion fields and schema_enabled exist
FAQPage blocked until visible approved FAQ and claim boundary version exist
FAQPage blocked until visible approved FAQ, handling/verification/retention-exception fields and schema_enabled exist
